name: General Magic, Inc.
description: General Magic, Inc. was an influential software and electronics company based in Mountain View, California. Originally co-founded in 1990 by Marc Porat, Andy Hertzfeld, and Bill Atkinson as a spin-off from Apple, the company developed Magic Cap, an object-oriented operating system, and Telescript, a programming language for mobile agents. General Magic pioneered early handheld personal communicators, precursors to modern smartphones, before ceasing operations in 2002.
